projectDescription: Open-source modular application framework for ASP.NET Core providing DDD, multi-tenancy, modularity, and pre-built modules for enterprise software.
keyFeatures: DDD building blocks (Entities, Aggregates, Repositories, Domain Services)
Unit of Work and transactional API
Entity Framework Core integration with multi-db providers (SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle, SQLite)
Object mapping with AutoMapper and Mapperly
ASP.NET Core MVC integration with auto API controllers
HTTP dynamic and static client proxies
Distributed event bus (RabbitMQ, Kafka, Azure Service Bus, Dapr, Rebus)
Background jobs (in-memory, Hangfire, Quartz, RabbitMQ, TickerQ)
BLOB storage providers (FileSystem, Azure, AWS, Google, Aliyun, Minio, Bunny, Memory, Database)
MVC UI tag helpers and Bootstrap themes
Blazor integration (Server, WebAssembly, MAUI, MudBlazor, Blazorise)
Identity module (users, roles, claim types, organization units)
Angular ng-packs (core, components, theme-shared, theme-basic, identity, account, oauth, permission/feature/setting/tenant management, cms-kit, schematics, generators)
NPM packs for MVC UI (core, jquery, datatables, sweetalert2, toastr, signalR, sortable, etc.)
ABP CLI (new, install-libs, generate-proxy, bundle, build, suite, switch-to-*)
ABP Suite and Studio integration entry points
Solution templates (app, app-nolayers, module, console, maui, wpf, angular)

wikiPagePlan.reason: Entry orientation page with architecture diagram and repo map
Top architecture: layers, modularity, DI, DDD, multi-tenancy
Layered project structure used by templates/modules

wikiGenerationShards.depthMix: 1 deep home, 1 deep architecture, 2 reference/standard, 1 reference glossary
